GOLARIONMAPS.GridSizeHint: Grid square size in image pixels
GOLARIONMAPS.Readout: Output {width}×{height} px · scene covers {sceneMiles} mi · one grid square ≈ {gridMiles} mi
GOLARIONMAPS.SceneCreated: Scene "{name}" created from the Golarion map.
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.ImportAll.Name: Install Golarion Maps
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.ImportAll.Label: Import All Scenes & Journals
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.ImportAll.Hint: Opens the installer: imports all scenes, their gazetteer journals, and folders in one pass (about a minute). Map pins link to journal pages; each page links to its PathfinderWiki article. Re-running after an update upgrades scenes in place.
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.EnablePicker.Name: Enable live map picker
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.EnablePicker.Hint: Adds a button to the Scenes sidebar that opens the live Golarion map, letting you bake any region into a scene. Requires access to the map data endpoint (see below). The curated scene compendium works without this.
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.TilesHost.Name: Map data endpoint
GOLARIONMAPS.Settings.TilesHost.Hint: Base URL serving golarion.pmtiles, fonts/ and sprites/. Use a CORS-enabled mirror, or a path inside your Foundry data (e.g. modules/foundryvtt-golarion-maps/map-data) for a self-hosted copy.
